name: RPlog_A_Walk_Amongst_the_Plant_Life
title: A Walk Amongst the Plant Life
summary: In the Silvergrass Arboretum aboard the shadowport Silver Station, the Quarren Doctor Druze takes a quiet stroll among the Kinyen flora to gather his wits and is greeted by the genial Crestian. The two strike up an easy conversation, reminiscing about Atsvara's recent birthday party and trading wry observations on dryland customs and the passage of time. Crestian welcomes Druze to treat the station as a friendly port, explaining its history as a discreet, less-than-legal operation that found a measure of quiet after Darth Malign's decade-long disappearance broke the old strength of the war. Druze marvels at the audacity of running a neutral shadowport wedged between predator and prey, and the cost of shipping water to keep the arboretum thriving. The amiable exchange ends with Druze resolving to explore the station and commit its amenities to memory.
